scripts.start: concurrently -k -n server,tunnel -c green,cyan "node src/server.js" "cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:3099"
scripts.stop: lsof -ti:3099 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'cloudflared tunnel' 2>/dev/null; exit 0
scripts.restart-server: lsof -ti:3099 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; node src/server.js
